---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for EDITH
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A short, one-line description of the feature you are requesting.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

Example: "When EDITH receives a voice message on WhatsApp, there is no way to see the transcription in the chat — only the final response."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you would like. Be as specific as possible.

If you have a technical proposal (e.g., which module to modify, what API to use), include it here.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you thought of other ways to solve the problem? Why is your proposed solution better?

## Affected Components

Which parts of EDITH does this touch? (check all that apply)

- [ ] Channels (Telegram / Discord / WhatsApp / webchat / other)
- [ ] Voice pipeline
- [ ] Vision pipeline
- [ ] Memory system
- [ ] Background daemon
- [ ] LLM engine / orchestrator
- [ ] Security layer
- [ ] Gateway / REST API
- [ ] MCP server
- [ ] CLI / onboarding
- [ ] Hardware bridge
- [ ] Documentation

## Phase

If this relates to a planned phase in the roadmap, which one?

Phase #: ___

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references that help explain the feature.
